'''''XTS-673''''' was a [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|Bulk cruiser]] operated by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]]. It interrupted an attempt by the [[Azzameen family]] to assault the [[Viraxo]] munitions cache near ''[[1]]'' by launching its squadrons of [[Supa Fighter]]s. [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] was successful in destroying all of the Supa Fighters.<ref name="SWXWA">[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
